overall.description: Static first-person view from a luxury high-rise apartment bedroom in Cyberpunk 2077, overlooking Night City through floor-to-ceiling windows. The camera remains fixed on a television rapidly cycling through futuristic advertisements and broadcasts, with a digital aquarium wall visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury bedroom with entertainment system overlooking city

events.description: television displays bright pink text advertisement reading 'WE'LL DO ANYTHING'
television shows 'WAKE UP SAMURAI' text with American flag background
television switches to Night City weather report showing cloudy conditions

agents.ego_description: stationary observer watching television advertisements from bed in luxury apartment

entered.detail: large bed with disheveled white sheets and pillows in the foreground
three tall windows with horizontal blinds showing rainy Night City skyline at night
curved ceiling with parallel wooden slats and recessed lighting
flat screen TV on black stand displaying rapidly changing advertisements
large illuminated wall display showing underwater scene with fish and coral
red neon light sculpture mounted on wall above the television
open magazine or book resting on the bed sheets

segments.scene_description: A static view of a cyberpunk luxury bedroom with an unmade bed in the foreground and floor-to-ceiling windows revealing a rainy Night City skyline. The television cycles rapidly through futuristic advertisements including 'WAKE UP SAMURAI' and weather reports, while a digital aquarium wall glows blue-green to the right. The room features warm interior lighting contrasting with the cool blue city lights outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a luxury cyberpunk bedroom that contrasts intimate interior warmth with a cold, rainy urban expanse. It begins with a view of an unmade bed in the foreground, framing a wide vista of the Night City skyline through floor-to-ceiling windows. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts toward a television rapidly cycling through futuristic advertisements and weather reports, including the bold text Wake Up Samurai. The scene then expands to include the soft, blue-green glow of a digital aquarium wall to the right, further deepening the contrast between the room's warm lighting and the cool blue tones of the storm-drenched city outside.
